raw.raw_text: The save button tooltip is slightly misaligned on the right edge of the Settings page. It overlaps the search icon by a few pixels. Not a big deal but it looks off. Firefox 122 on macOS.

fields.body: The save button tooltip is slightly misaligned on the right edge of the Settings page. It overlaps the search icon by a few pixels. Not a big deal but it looks off. Firefox 122 on macOS.
fields.observed_result: The save button tooltip is misaligned and overlaps the search icon by a few pixels on the Settings page.
